title: Phoenix Summit 2026
venue: Bangabandhu International Conference Center (BICC), Dhaka, Bangladesh
fee:
Exhibition Pass: 200 BDT
Technical Pass (with Swag): 700 BDT
Student Workshops: 10,000 BDT
Professional Workshops: 15,000 BDT (Early Bird: 12,000 BDT)

subEvents.title: June 23-25: Pre-Summit Workshops (09:00 AM - 06:00 PM)
subEvents.details:
- Practical Cyber Investigation (Invite-only, APNIC)
- DevSecOps for Practitioners (Open)
- Master Application Security & Penetration Testing
- Ransomware Mechanics & Defensive Engineering

subEvents.title: June 26: Blue Team Day (Technical Stage @ Hall of Fame)
subEvents.details:
- 09:00 AM: Telecom Attack Detection Using AI (Pasan Maduranga)
- 09:30 AM: Security Engineering & Orchestration (Syed Golam Abid)
- 10:00 AM: Reducing Alert Fatigue with AI Agents (Nur Qurratu Aini)
- 11:00 AM: Opening Ceremony & Shadow Server Keynote (Piotr Kijewski)
- 02:30 PM: Ransomware Ecosystem Forensics (Md. Azim Uddin)
- 03:00 PM: National DNSSEC Deployment (Joyeeta Sen Rimpee)
- 03:30 PM: Cyber Workforce Panel (A S M Shamim Reza, GP, Dtech, Brain Station)
- 04:40 PM: SANS International Keynote (Arindam Roy)
- 05:10 PM: Panel: Digital Trust in Education & Academic Integrity
- 05:40 PM: Real-Time IoC Detection with Wazuh (Imtiaz Rahman)
- 06:30 PM: Musical Concert

subEvents.title: June 27: Red Team Day (Technical Stage @ Hall of Fame)
subEvents.details:
- 09:00 AM: AI in Offensive Security & Bug Bounty (Ayon Hasan)
- 09:30 AM: Exploiting JWTs & Library Gaps (Eftasib Araf Depro)
- 10:00 AM: Thailand's Cybersecurity Readiness (Paramin Chuangmanee)
- 11:00 AM: Panel: AI, Quantum & the New Cyber Threat Battlefield
- 11:40 AM: Antivirus Bypass Reality & Detection Logic (Md Sameull Islam)
- 12:20 PM: AI Subversion & Red Teaming (Md. Safwan Luban)
- 02:30 PM: AI-Generated Code Review Gaps (Asyrique Thevendran)
- 03:00 PM: Security Hardening (Pratima Pradhan, btCERT)
- 03:20 PM: Panel: Deepfakes & Synthetic Manipulation Defense
- 04:30 PM: Closing Ceremony, Awards & Keynote (Fauzia Idrees)
- 06:30 PM: Musical Concert

details:
Phoenix Summit 2026 is Bangladesh's flagship cybersecurity convergence platform connecting government, industry, academia, and global experts.

We are organizing a massive squad of Event Raiders to attend. This is an unparalleled opportunity to learn from international specialists (APNIC, Shadow Server, SANS), witness live technical demonstrations, and network with leading security companies.

Verify your student status with the maintainers in the 'Join Us' tab to book group transportation and tickets together!
